summary: Frontend-only mobile web verification completed for rollback scope: restored original equalizer card + neon ribbon underlay, removed wave-choice controls, and validated Weight Loss playback now-playing state.

integration_issues.issue: Intermittent preview outages showed 'The preview environment is not responding' during some runs before recovering.
Console intermittently logs 'Disconnected from Metro (1006)' after tapping play, though playback and UI state still proceeded.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: props.pointerEvents is deprecated; use style.pointerEvents.
useNativeDriver fallback warning appears on Expo web runtime.

action_items: Investigate Expo/ngrok tunnel instability causing intermittent public preview unavailability.
Review Metro disconnect (1006) log around Home play tap to ensure no hidden playback/session drop on real devices.
Migrate deprecated pointerEvents prop usage to style.pointerEvents to remove runtime warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: Most interactive elements in Home/Frequencies test scope have testID coverage for automation-critical paths (good).
BinauralBeats playback path remains aligned with env-based backend URL and no hardcoded hosts detected in tested files.

success_rate.frontend: 100% for requested feature checks; intermittent tunnel availability observed

context_for_next_testing_agent: Core requested flows passed on reachable runs: restored Home card with equalizer+neon, wave controls removed on Home/Heal, Weight Loss card enters now-playing, and bottom tab navigation cycle (Home/Voice/Tasks/Settings/Home) worked. Public preview tunnel remained intermittently flaky.
rca_of_issue: Intermittent failures were environment-level (Expo tunnel/ngrok readiness), not deterministic selector or app-flow failures. Re-running after tunnel recovery allowed full scenario pass.
